creator: kodcode@gmx.com
text:
(In reply to Graham Perrin from comment #1)

Thanks.

In order to limit the number of changes in that paragraph, I would stick with "The OPIE prompt provides...".

As a complete newbie, spending a fair amount of time reading handbooks, I do appreciate the "relaxed" writing style in the FreeBSD handbook. 

True, if you use it merely as a reference book, such sentences have low or no value.
